About Me

The VA Behind Your Brand's Growth

Hi, I'm Ma. Antoneth — call me Anne. I'm a dedicated Virtual Assistant specializing in Social Media Management and Lead Generation, backed by nearly nine years of customer service excellence.

I understand what business owners need: a trusted partner who takes ownership, communicates clearly, and delivers results without hand-holding. Whether you need consistent content, a stronger pipeline, or better online engagement — I've got you covered.

Every client I've worked with has trusted me with their brand, their leads, and their reputation — and I take that seriously. I bring the same reliability and care to every project, whether you're a startup or an established business.

"I don't just manage content — I help your brand grow."

What I Offer

Services Built for Growth

Every service I provide is designed to save you time, expand your reach, and bring qualified leads to your business. No cookie-cutter packages — just focused, intentional work aligned to your goals.

01
📲

Social Media Management

Consistent, on-brand presence across your platforms — without the stress of doing it yourself.

  • Content creation & scheduling
  • Facebook, LinkedIn & Instagram
  • Content calendar management
  • Hashtag & engagement strategy
02
🎯

Lead Generation

Targeted outreach to fill your pipeline with qualified prospects ready to convert.

  • Prospect research & qualification
  • Email outreach campaigns
  • CRM setup & tracking
  • Appointment scheduling
03
✍️

Content Strategy

Purposeful content planning that builds authority and grows your audience organically.

  • Content pillars & planning
  • Audience growth strategies
  • Copywriting for captions & posts
  • Brand voice consistency
04
💬

Community Engagement

Authentic interactions that build trust and keep your audience coming back.

  • Comment & DM responses
  • Audience relationship building
  • Brand awareness initiatives
  • Reputation management
05
📧

Email Marketing

Nurture sequences and campaigns that convert your list into loyal clients.

  • Mailchimp campaign setup
  • Email copywriting & design
  • List management & segmentation
  • Follow-up sequences
06
🗂️

CRM & Admin Support

Organized systems so nothing falls through the cracks — ever.

  • HubSpot & Salesforce management
  • Data entry & database cleanup
  • Pipeline tracking & reporting
  • Meeting & calendar coordination
07
📞

Appointment Setting & Outreach

Consistent, professional outreach that fills your calendar with qualified prospects and warm conversations.

  • Cold calling & warm outreach
  • Appointment scheduling & follow-ups
  • Scripts & objection handling
  • Prospect qualification & tracking
08
🤖

AI-Powered Integration

Smarter workflows using the latest AI tools — so your business runs faster, leaner, and more effectively.

  • AI content drafting & optimization
  • Workflow automation setup
  • AI-assisted lead research
  • Tool integration & efficiency audits
09
🎬

Video Editing

Polished, engaging video content that captures attention and keeps your audience watching.

  • Short-form reels & TikTok edits
  • Caption & subtitle overlays
  • Branded intros & outros
  • CapCut editing & post-production

How It Works

Simple. Seamless. Results.

01
Discovery Call

We connect to discuss your business goals, current challenges, and what success looks like for you.

02
Custom Proposal

I craft a tailored plan of services, timelines, and deliverables aligned to your specific needs.

03
Onboarding

Smooth handover of tools, accounts, and brand assets. We set up systems and I get to work quickly.

04
Ongoing Growth

Regular reporting, open communication, and continuous optimization to keep your brand moving forward.
